name: claude-ide-bridge-extension
description: Companion extension for claude-ide-bridge — provides real-time editor state to Claude Code

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Watches for a manually-started bridge via lock file. Bridge auto-install and auto-start are disabled in untrusted workspaces.

claudeIdeBridge.logLevel.description: Log verbosity level for the output channel.

claudeIdeBridge.autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to the bridge on startup.

claudeIdeBridge.lockFileDir.description: Override the lock file directory (default: ~/.claude/ide/). Useful for multi-bridge setups.

claudeIdeBridge.autoStartBridge.description: Automatically start the claude-ide-bridge process on VS Code startup. Disable to manage the bridge process manually.

claudeIdeBridge.autoInstallBridge.description: Automatically install or upgrade claude-ide-bridge via npm when a newer version is bundled with the extension.

commands.title: Claude IDE Bridge: Copy Connection Info
Claude IDE Bridge: Install / Upgrade Bridge
